proposed_case_title: LinkedIn post alleges SSRN citation-scam pattern involving a similar paper and artificial citation boosting
proposed_evidence_tier: public first-person social post; needs original source corroboration
bounded_claim_candidate: A public LinkedIn post by Grischa Liebel describes finding an SSRN paper that appeared similar to the authors' preprint and alleges a citation-scam pattern involving indexed citations to boost metrics.
claim_ceiling: Bounded to what the LinkedIn post alleges; treat as allegation/source lead, not verified misconduct or AI-generated paper finding.
